creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like this commit:

commit 3090fb28eeee869dc7434dfa2a453b6698ec7f43
Author:     Piotr Kubaj <pkubaj@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: Tue Apr 12 18:06:17 2022 +0000
Commit:     Piotr Kubaj <pkubaj@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: Tue Apr 12 18:06:17 2022 +0000

    www/firefox: fix some of color issues on big-endian
    
    Upstream issue at https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1716707.


Also caused address bar icons to fail display on amd64. I'll see if f70859f074 fixes this.
